description_long: This object is a straight-edged sword with a long, narrow blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade appears to be made of metal, with a uniform, matte gray finish and no visible serrations or decorative markings. The crossguard is simple and straight, providing basic hand protection, and is also metallic in appearance. The handle is cylindrical and extends from the crossguard, featuring a subtle grip pattern and ending in a small, rounded pommel. The overall design is utilitarian, lacking any visible ornamentation or embellishments. The sword's proportions suggest it is designed for one-handed use, suitable for practical or ceremonial purposes in an urban context.
description: A straight, narrow-bladed sword with a simple crossguard and cylindrical handle, all in a matte gray metallic finish. The design is utilitarian and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, crossguard, and cylindrical handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle and crossguard.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and the straight handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, metallic, subtle grip pattern, rounded pommel
